intent: Support moving folders by dragging onto a target folder, with mobile long-press drag and existing move APIs.
assumptions: Folder dropped on another folder moves into that target.
Mobile drag starts only after long press.
Backend move APIs enforce ownership and cycle safety.
risks: Short taps must not trigger movement.
Touch scrolling must cancel pending long press.
Virtualized off-screen targets cannot receive drops.
Existing desktop file drag behavior must remain intact.
